name: Ping Pong
current_goal: Maintain the single-node intranet speed-test service at app version 0.3.3 with browser-scoped Recent Results, fixed homepage Quick 30s and Full 45s modes, proportional startup trimming, Raw CV and Stable CV throughput diagnostics, IQR kept/outlier-rate card diagnostics, current-run Raw Data popup/CSV diagnostics, a topbar English speed-test guide dialog, stability-first completion summaries graded on Stable CV with loosened IQR outlier thresholds, hotspot data-plan warning, required per-test Wired/Wi-Fi labeling, current connection IP visibility, Web Worker execution, HTML/PNG/Markdown IT diagnostic report export, local-throttled maintenance self-tests, a desktop one-screen dashboard, Admin Console controls, local production health, OctoPulse visibility, and repo-visible reusable documentation.
latest_summary: Implemented dynamic connection-type-aware throughput sampling intervals (500ms for Wired, 250ms for Wi-Fi) and IQR multiplier adjustments (1.2 for Wired, 1.5 for Wi-Fi).
next_action: Resume normal maintenance on main at version 0.3.3.

verification.notes: Verified that all 106 automated tests compile and pass successfully.

attention: Git origin now points at https://git.insea.io/twn-general/ping-pong.git (moved from git@git.insea.io:lindav/ping-pong.git).
The local branch currently tracks origin/main.
The running service uses .env PORT=8200, not the README default 8080.

Stability grading now consumes Stable CV (post-IQR) instead of Raw CV; IQR outlier thresholds widened (Wired 8/15/25%, Wi-Fi 12/22/35%) to stop a single noisy sample from cascading a fast connection to poor.
Homepage modes now run 30s / 45s; total per-test data is roughly 50% larger than before.
Local throttled runs are maintenance checks only; a non-local intranet device test is still required to evaluate real network performance.

recent_changes.summary: Implemented dynamic connection-type-aware throughput sampling intervals (500ms for Wired, 250ms for Wi-Fi) and IQR multiplier adjustments (1.2 for Wired, 1.5 for Wi-Fi).
Corrected the app version to v0.3.2 in README.md.
Updated local .env.development to use localhost and created .env.development.example to document dev API configuration.
recent_changes.verification: git add .env.development.example; git commit; git push github main

recent_changes.summary: Rewrote Git history using git filter-branch to remove the screenshots directory and .env.development file, then force-pushed to the private GitHub repository.
recent_changes.verification: git filter-branch ...; git gc ...; git push github main --force

recent_changes.summary: Created a new private repository on GitHub (davislinyd/ping-pong) and pushed the local main branch, setting it to track github/main.
